headline: NocoBase 2.0 Beginner Tutorial: Build an IT HelpDesk from Scratch
description: Build an IT HelpDesk system from scratch with NocoBase 2.0, covering data modeling, page design, access control, workflows, and dashboards — no coding required.
keywords: NocoBase, no-code, low-code, HelpDesk, IT ticket system, open-source, self-hosted

faq.q: What is NocoBase best suited for?
faq.a: Internal business tools, data management systems, approval workflows, CRM, ERP, and other scenarios requiring flexible customization with self-hosted deployment.
No programming required, but some basic computer knowledge is recommended. The tutorial explains concepts step by step.

faq.q: Are there limitations in the free version?
faq.a: Core features are fully free and open-source. The commercial edition offers additional premium plugins and technical support.
